parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $json.repoName, private: false, auto_init: true, description: $json.businessName + ' - Built by The Forge' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'Add Claude Code GitHub Action workflow', content: $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.claudeYmlB64 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'Add CLAUDE.md with full PRD-derived design system and spec', content: $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.claudeMdB64 }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'success', message: 'Birth Protocol complete for ' + $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.businessName, businessId: $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.businessId, repoUrl: 'https://github.com/ShalinPatel670/' + $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.repoName, issueUrl: $('Step 4 - Create Build Issue').first().json.html_url || 'created', hasPrd: $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.hasPrd, steps: { repoCreated: true, claudeActionAdded: true, claudeMdAdded: true, buildIssueCreated: true, knowledgeGraphUpdated: true } }) }}
